approvalSource: Steve approved unattended overnight Foundation audit-control work and explicitly required that audit findings become fixes, live cards, gates, or proof instead of report noise.
constraints: do not implement audit findings inside the closure gate
all P0/P1/P2 findings must route to live backlog truth or shipped proof
scoped findings are not fixed; keep the next P1 card active
green means raw green; repeated failures repair first
each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main
